title: Deploy (Nested Steps)
expectation: Use the manager runtime surface as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit the shared repository checkout or use a manager integration worktree for source-control promotion during deploy. Start from an already promoted release target whose merge into `development`, promotion onto `main`, and release-tag creation have already been completed on the authoritative worker surface. Then update the manager runtime checkout to that promoted target, restart through the canonical deploy-manager-runtime path, verify runtime revision and version match, perform local and browser verification, and complete cleanup or rollback recovery as required.
idlePrompt: If deployment is complete, reply only with 'done: deploy complete'. If you are truly blocked on a missing promoted release target, user decision, or environment dependency, reply only with 'blocked: deploy blocked'. Otherwise resume the deploy process immediately and perform the next required runtime update, deploy, cleanup, or validation step instead of giving only a status update.
stopConditions: blocked on promoted release target, user decision, or environment dependency

steps.title: Clean up the feature branch and worker worktree
